title: The ability to copy individual tasks/groups from one board to another
excerpt: I think it would be useful to copy a group, or multiple groups, from one project to the other.  For instance you created a project but not using a template but realise that you want to use the same tasks from the templat…

posts.author: Caroline24 (Caroline Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml: I think it would be useful to copy a group, or multiple groups, from one project to the other. For instance you created a project but not using a template but realise that you want to use the same tasks from the template. Rather than having to recreate the tasks you could copy one or more groups from the template, or any other board, to your new project.
